---
title: "Limitations"
---

The omics analyses are exploratory hypothesis-generation screens. Nominal P-value thresholds were used to form broad feature sets for network construction, while FDR values are reported transparently in complete tables.

Many nominal-discovery features, especially miRNAs and circRNAs, do not survive correction for multiple testing. Predicted miRNA-target network edges are hypothesis-generating. Experimental evaluation was performed for selected axes and produced both supportive and negative or inconclusive results.

The strongest interpretation should be placed on interactions with independent functional support. The complete predicted circRNA-miRNA-mRNA competitive mechanism was not validated for every edge.
